welcometosolana.xyz

Purpose: A guided migration engine for people, communities, and builders moving into Solana. Users choose a path: move assets, move community, start building, or just explore. The site also includes a full Solana ecosystem directory, Solflare wallet path, and a step-by-step migration playbook.

Canonical: https://welcometosolana.xyz/
Sitemap: https://welcometosolana.xyz/sitemap.xml

Key sections:
- Journey selector: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#journeys
- Move assets: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#journey-assets
- Move community: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#journey-community
- Start building: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#journey-build
- Just exploring: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#journey-explore
- Ecosystem directory: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#ecosystem
- Migration playbook: https://welcometosolana.xyz/#how
